headline: Amazon commits to invest up to $35.0 billion in OpenAI's Series C Preferred Stock and enters into a strategic AWS cloud and AI collaboration agreement.
investor_impact: This massive $35 billion commitment, combined with a separate $15 billion near-term investment, significantly strengthens Amazon's position in the generative AI arms race. Securing OpenAI as a major AWS customer and integrating OpenAI models into AWS will likely drive substantial cloud revenue growth and directly challenge competitors' AI market share.
key_figures: $35.0 billion commitment amount for OpenAI Series C Preferred Stock
$15.0 billion separate investment in OpenAI's current funding round
March 31, 2026 obligation date for the $15.0 billion investment
December 31, 2028 termination date for the $35.0 billion commitment
